channel.title: Miguel's Morning Bytes
channel.description: A daily executive briefing on the news shaping AI, enterprise software, and the future of work. Each morning, Miguel's Morning Bytes walks through the top stories from across the press — frontier model launches, competitor moves, Salesforce and Agentforce headlines, hiring and labor shifts — through the lens of what a Chief Revenue Officer needs to know.
channel.itunes:author: Miguel's Morning Bytes
channel.itunes:summary: A daily executive briefing on the news shaping AI, enterprise software, and the future of work. Each morning, Miguel's Morning Bytes walks through the top stories from across the press — frontier model launches, competitor moves, Salesforce and Agentforce headlines, hiring and labor shifts — through the lens of what a Chief Revenue Officer needs to know.

item.title: May 27, 2026 — Salesforce Gives Lukewarm Outlook That Fuels Disruption Fear
item.description: Today's brief leads with Salesforce Gives Lukewarm Outlook That Fuels Disruption Fear. Also covered: Snowflake Jumps 30% on Sales Outlook, $6 Billion Amazon Deal; AI Coding Startup Cognition Raises $1 Billion at $26 Billion Value; Meta to Sell AI Chatbot Subscriptions to Offset Spending; China Wants Its Companies to Embrace AI—Without Firing Workers; KPMG scouts Silicon Valley start-ups in bid to head off AI disruption.

item.title: May 26, 2026 — China Expands Travel Curbs to Top AI Talent at Private Firms
item.description: Today's brief leads with China Expands Travel Curbs to Top AI Talent at Private Firms. Also covered: Qualcomm Strikes AI Chip Deal With TikTok Owner ByteDance; Mistral AI Takes Aim at Legal Sector Through Expanded Harvey AI Partnership; BNP Paribas Works With Mistral to Prep for Mythos-Like AI Models; ING's 'Vibe Coding' AI Is Building Its New Trading Systems; The First Class of AI Natives Is Graduating. Offices Are Getting Ready..

item.title: May 25, 2026 — Pope Leo Says AI 'Needs to Be Disarmed' in First Encyclical Addressing the Technology
item.description: Today's brief leads with Pope Leo Says AI 'Needs to Be Disarmed' in First Encyclical Addressing the Technology. Also covered: Huawei Touts Chip Breakthrough to Shorten Gap With TSMC; Uber Weighs Higher Bid for Delivery Hero After €11.5B Offer Rebuffed; AI Guardrails Stripped From Meta and Google Models in Minutes; ECB Summons Banks to Fix Flaws Exposed by Latest AI Models; Meet Andrew Bosworth, Mark Zuckerberg's Right-Hand Man Unleashing AI at Meta.

item.title: May 24, 2026 — Rivals Turn Partners as Anthropic Inks Deal to Secure Computing Power From xAI's Colossus 1
item.description: Today's brief leads with Rivals Turn Partners as Anthropic Inks Deal to Secure Computing Power From xAI's Colossus 1. Also covered: Anthropic Says Mythos Has Found More Than 10,000 Software Flaws; Pentagon Used Anthropic's Claude in Maduro Venezuela Raid; PayPal Partners With Anthropic to Educate Small Businesses on AI; Adobe Launches Brand Visibility Solution to Optimize Digital Channels for AI Discovery Surfaces; Bridgewater Associates Is Trading the Software Apocalypse as It Sells Workday, Salesforce, Other Key SaaS Stocks.

item.title: May 23, 2026 — Anthropic to Close Over $30 Billion Round at $900B+ Valuation
item.description: Today's brief leads with Anthropic to Close Over $30 Billion Round at $900B+ Valuation. Also covered: SpaceX Launches Redesigned Starship in Successful Pre-IPO Test; David Sacks's 11th-Hour Plea Led to Trump's Backtrack on AI Executive Order; DeepSeek to Make Permanent 75% Discount on Flagship V4-Pro Model; A Tale of Two Anthropics; Zoom's Anthropic Investment Has Netted the Company $1 Billion.

item.title: May 22, 2026 — SpaceX S-1 Sets Up 'Most Management-Favorable' Governance Ever, Public Funds Charge
item.description: Today's brief leads with SpaceX S-1 Sets Up 'Most Management-Favorable' Governance Ever, Public Funds Charge. Also covered: U.S. to Award Quantum-Computing Firms $2 Billion and Take Equity Stakes; DeepSeek Founder Avows AGI Goal Ahead of $10 Billion Funding; Trump Abruptly Postpones AI Order After White House Infighting; Cursor Hits $3 Billion Annual Sales Rate Ahead of SpaceX Deal; Workday Rallies After Results Quiet Fears of AI Disruption.

item.title: May 21, 2026 — Nvidia's Profit Hits $58.3 Billion as AI Boom Gathers More Steam
item.description: Today's brief leads with Nvidia's Profit Hits $58.3 Billion as AI Boom Gathers More Steam. Also covered: Elon Musk's SpaceX Sets Out Plans for Biggest IPO in History; Trump Plans to Sign Executive Order Granting Oversight of AI Models; Anthropic on Track for First Profitable Quarter; Anthropic Weighs Using Microsoft AI Chips; OpenAI Readies IPO Filing to List as Soon as September.

item.title: May 20, 2026 — Meta Begins Laying Off 8,000 Employees as It Transforms Around AI
item.description: Today's brief leads with Meta Begins Laying Off 8,000 Employees as It Transforms Around AI. Also covered: SpaceX Expected to Make IPO Filing Public Today; Bristol-Myers Squibb Brings Anthropic's Claude to 30,000 Staff; Alibaba Ramps Up AI Push With New Chip, Model Upgrades; Major Chatbots Found Unreliable on Elections, News Topics; Commerzbank CEO Says AI Will Cut €350 Million in Costs by 2030.

item.title: May 19, 2026 — Google Overhauls Search Box, Unveils Gemini Spark Agent and Coding Tools at I/O
item.description: Today's brief leads with Google Overhauls Search Box, Unveils Gemini Spark Agent and Coding Tools at I/O. Also covered: NextEra Strikes $420B Mega Deal With Dominion to Create US Utility Giant; Andrej Karpathy, OpenAI Co-Founder and Tesla Alum, Joins Anthropic; Parag Agrawal's Parallel Launches Index to Pay Publishers When AI Agents Use Their Work; AI Startup Viktor Raises $75M to Put a Virtual Coworker in Slack and Teams; Cisco Shares Slip After CFO Flags AI-Infrastructure Margin Headwind.

item.description: Today's brief leads with title. Also covered: url; source; lede; why_it_matters; person.
